title: Draw Steel Ancestry
description: A hero ancestry for Draw Steel, including signature trait and purchasable traits.

signature_trait_name.description: The name of the ancestry's signature trait (e.g., "Detect the Supernatural").

signature_trait_description.description: Full text of the signature trait's effect.

ancestry_points.description: Number of ancestry points available to spend on purchased traits (3 in core rules).

purchased_traits.description: Traits available for purchase with ancestry points.

content.description: Raw markdown body of the ancestry description.

name.description: The name of the trait (e.g., "Perseverance", "Staying Power").

description.description: Full text of the trait's effect.
